measures.name: Total Census Count
measures.description: Total midnight census count across the selected period.

measures.name: User Defined Census Count
measures.dax:
SWITCH (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Filter Adults/Peds'[Filter Adults/Peds], "(All)" ),
    "(All)", SUM ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Count] ),
    "Adults", SUM ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Count Adults] ),
    "Peds", SUM ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Count Peds] )
)
measures.description: Census count switched by the Adults/Peds parameter selection.

measures.name: Start Month Contains Partial Data?
measures.dax:
VAR StartParam = [Start Date]
VAR MaxCensus = MAX ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Date] )
VAR MinCensus = MIN ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Date] )
VAR FirstOfMinMonth = DATE ( YEAR ( MinCensus ), MONTH ( MinCensus ), 1 )
RETURN
    IF (
        YEAR ( MaxCensus ) = YEAR ( StartParam )
            && MONTH ( MaxCensus ) = MONTH ( StartParam )
            && StartParam <> FirstOfMinMonth,
        1,
        0
    )
measures.description: Flags 1 when the start month shows only partial census data (start date is not the first day of the earliest census month).

measures.name: End Month Contains Partial Data?
measures.dax:
VAR EndParam = [End Date]
VAR MaxCensus = MAX ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Date] )
VAR LastOfEndMonth = EOMONTH ( EndParam, 0 )
RETURN
    IF (
        YEAR ( MaxCensus ) = YEAR ( EndParam )
            && MONTH ( MaxCensus ) = MONTH ( EndParam )
            && EndParam <> LastOfEndMonth,
        1,
        0
    )
measures.description: Flags 1 when the end month shows only partial census data (end date is not the last day of its month).

measures.name: Show Monthly Bar
measures.dax:
IF (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Date Agg Level'[Date Agg Level], "Monthly" ) = "Monthly"
        && SELECTEDVALUE ( 'View'[View], "Bar Chart" ) = "Bar Chart",
    1,
    0
)
measures.description: Returns 1 only when Date Agg Level = Monthly and View = Bar Chart, so the Monthly bar visual shows for that combination.

measures.name: Show Monthly Table
measures.dax:
IF (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Date Agg Level'[Date Agg Level], "Monthly" ) = "Monthly"
        && SELECTEDVALUE ( 'View'[View], "Bar Chart" ) = "Data Table",
    1,
    0
)
measures.description: Returns 1 only when Date Agg Level = Monthly and View = Data Table, so the Monthly table visual shows for that combination.

measures.name: Show Daily Bar
measures.dax:
IF (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Date Agg Level'[Date Agg Level], "Monthly" ) = "Daily"
        && SELECTEDVALUE ( 'View'[View], "Bar Chart" ) = "Bar Chart",
    1,
    0
)
measures.description: Returns 1 only when Date Agg Level = Daily and View = Bar Chart, so the Daily bar visual shows for that combination.

measures.name: Show Daily Table
measures.dax:
IF (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Date Agg Level'[Date Agg Level], "Monthly" ) = "Daily"
        && SELECTEDVALUE ( 'View'[View], "Bar Chart" ) = "Data Table",
    1,
    0
)
measures.description: Returns 1 only when Date Agg Level = Daily and View = Data Table, so the Daily table visual shows for that combination.
